panels.description: Wide shot: The protagonist walking through the foggy, gothic stone streets of Ingolstadt, looking contemplative and slightly lost. Moody lighting, historical European university town atmosphere.

bubbles.text: I was required to exchange chimeras of grandeur for realities of little worth. And then, I recalled the lectures M. Krempe spoke of.

panels.description: Medium shot: Professor M. Waldman standing at a lectern in a grand university hall. He looks benevolent, aged 50, with grey temples and black hair. He looks upright and distinguished.

bubbles.text: Welcome, students. Today we discuss the history of chemistry and the miracles wrought by modern science.

panels.description: Medium shot: Waldman gesticulating with passion, chemistry equipment behind him. The atmosphere is academic and inspiring.

bubbles.text: They penetrate the recesses of nature! They show how she works in her hiding-places!

panels.description: Close-up: The protagonist's face, eyes wide with obsessive realization, illuminated by a single shaft of light, shadow intensifying around his features.

bubbles.text: More... I will achieve far more. I will unfold the deepest mysteries of creation!

panels.description: Medium shot: Inside Waldman’s study, books everywhere. Waldman sits across from the protagonist, smiling kindly. The tone is warm and scholarly.

bubbles.text: Cornelius Agrippa? A fascinating choice of study, though perhaps outdated, my young friend.
